memoryArtifacts.headline: Nils Andersson and His Lykins Descendants - Dr. Peter Stebbins Craig pg 3
memoryArtifacts.description: Published by the Swedish Colonial Society. Originally published in "Swedish Colonial News", Volume 3, Number 5

This view of the Southwest corner of the cemetery includes grave for some of the earlier settlers, including that of Peter Jones (1749-1800) a Revolutionary War veteran. His grave lies at the right center with flag & marker. Other Revolutionary War graves lie at the far back. The graves in this entire back section of the cemetery are unmarked.
This view looks toward the railroad. At a short distance across lies the old village of Morlatton, the original Douglassville

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ingeborg Lycon於1669年出生在瑞典維亞姆藍德阿維卡時，她的父親Peter Nilsson Lycon29歲，母親Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo29歲。她於大約1682年與Mouns Jonasson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1735年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾享年66歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾聖 加布利艾爾斯 艾比斯可帕爾 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ingeborg Lycon于1669年出生在瑞典維亞姆藍德阿維卡时，她的父亲Peter Nilsson Lycon29岁，母亲Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo29岁。她于大约1682年与Mouns Jonasson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1735年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾享年66岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾聖 加布利艾爾斯 艾比斯可帕爾 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Lycon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Carlos, Jose, Juan, Armando, Arturo, Manuel, Miguel, Octavio, Rafael, Ramon, Ricardo.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably an altered form of Basque   Licona  .

variants.name: Licona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pablo, Alberto, Candida Rosa, Francisco, Guillermo, Jesus, Juan, Adan, Alfonso, Alfredo, Andres.
Basque: Castilianized form of Likona, a habitational name from Likoa, in Biscay (Basque Country, Spain).

nameMeanings.name: Ingeborg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + borg ‘fortification’.

historicEvents.description: King Charles II barred Jews from settling in Stockholm.
King Charles II invaded Denmark. Forced Danish King to sign Peace of Travendal.

historicEvents.title: The Great Northern War
historicEvents.description: By 1658, Sweden had become a great power in northern Europe. The Great Northern War from 1700 through 1721 resulted in the loss of land amassed by Sweden in areas such as Germany, Norway, and Denmark. Nearly 200,000 Swedes lost their lives due to the war while Sweden lost much of its dominance in the Baltic Region.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list

en.lifeSummary: When Ingeborg Lycon was born in 1669, in Arvika, Värmland, Sweden, her father, Peter Nilsson Lycon, was 29 and her mother, Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo, was 29. She married Mouns Jonasson about 1682, in Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1735, in Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 66, and was buried in Saint Gabriels Episcopal Church Cemetery, Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ingeborg Lycon est née en 1669, à Arvika, Värmland, Suède, son père, Peter Nilsson Lycon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Mouns Jonasson environ 1682, à Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1735, à Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Gabriels Episcopal Church Cemetery, Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Lyconが1669年にスウェーデンvaルムランドアルヴィカで生まれた時，父Peter Nilsson Lyconは29歳，母Catherine Mattson Peterson Ramboは29歳であった。約1682年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州でMouns Jonassonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1735年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州バークスアミトイ トウンシュイップドウグラスヴィルで66歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスアミトイ トウンシュイップドウグラスヴィルサイント ガブリールズ エパスコプアル チャーチ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ingeborg Lycon(이)가 1669년 스웨덴 브a랜드 아빅아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Nilsson Lycon(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1682년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주에서 Mouns Jonasson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1735년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 아미티 타운시프 더글래스빌에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 아미티 타운시프 더글래스빌 세인트 개브리얼스 프이스코팔 처르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ingeborg Lycon nasceu em 1669, em Arvika, Värmland, Suécia, seu pai, Peter Nilsson Lycon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Mouns Jonasson aproximadamente 1682, em Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1735, em Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Gabriels Episcopal Church Cemetery, Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ingeborg Lycon родилась в 1669 г. в местности арвика, вaрмланд, Швеция, её отцу по имени Peter Nilsson Lycon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mouns Jonasson около 1682 г. в местности Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1735 г. в местности доуглассвилл, амити тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт габриелс эпископаль чурч кеметири, доуглассвилл, амити тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ingeborg Lycon nació en 1669, en Arvika, Värmland, Suecia, su papá, Peter Nilsson Lycon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mouns Jonasson aproximadamente 1682, en Pensilvania, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1735, en Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Gabriels Episcopal Church Cemetery, Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
